use_cases: Creates an immersive animated background for landing pages and hero sections
Adds dynamic visual interest to product showcases and portfolio sites
Provides engaging loading or waiting state animations
Serves as an interactive decorative element for modern web applications
Enhances visual appeal of SaaS dashboards and marketing sites
ai_summary: A Three.js-based 3D floating particle system with configurable physics simulation, featuring WebGL rendering, customizable particle colors, rotation speed, and antigravity effects. Particles can activate dynamically and the system includes anchor-based movement physics for organic animation.
